steps.title: Notice the exception
steps.content: The passage defines sea-based thalassocracies and land-based tellurocracies as distinct categories. That creates a clean binary: control of the sea versus control of land. The next sentence introduces the Ottoman Empire, which is known for both land and sea supremacy.

steps.title: Signal a complication
steps.content: A gives an unsupported example about tellurocracies. B repeats the sea-based idea. C merely restates classification. Because the Ottoman example crosses both categories, the sentence needs a transition that says the distinction has exceptions rather than simply continuing the classification. The answer is D.
